Install

Make your website accessible to everyone, effortlessly.

Inkluyo is the 1-line accessibility widget (or zero-config plugin) that adapts your site to your users' needs. Professional, lightweight, and seamlessly playful.

View PricingTry Interactive Demo→

The cost of bad accessibility

These numbers are real. Your site is probably part of them.

of websites have at least one WCAG failure

in global accessibility lawsuits since 2018

people worldwide live with a disability

average time to install Inkluyo

Accessibility that actually works

Dyslexia Friendly
Instantly swap your fonts to dyslexic-friendly typefaces.
High Contrast
Smart inversion of colors so text is always readable.
Calm Mode
Pause all animations and transitions with one click.

Want to see how we fix a truly broken site?

We built the worst, most inaccessible webpage imaginable just to prove a point. See how the Inkluyo widget fixes it in real time.
